Headline: #34 South Michigan Temporary Reroute at130th/King Dr
ShortDescription: #34 South Michigan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 130th/King Dr.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#34 South Michigan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 127th, Indiana, 134th,133rd pl, Langley and 131st then resume their normal route, due to street blockage near 130th/King Dr.

Allow extra travel time.
